Shipping & Delivery

Processing Time

AVGearShop.ca processes all orders within approximately 1 to 2 business days, provided there are no problems with payment verification. AVGearShop.ca does not guarantee same day-shipping. Orders are not processed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Method

AVGearShop.ca ships all orders via Canada Post. In the event that delivery with Canada Post is not available due to a work stoppage or strike, AVGearShop.ca will ship all orders via Federal Express. AVGearShop.ca reserves all rights to use an alternate carrier if necessary.

Shipping Origin

AVGearShop.ca (with a few exceptions) ships all orders from our warehouse in Ontario, Canada. For selective products AVGearShop.ca may utilize third party fulfillment.

USA Shipping

AVGearShop.ca ships orders to customers located in the contiguous United States. For customers located in Hawaii and Alaska, please contact us in advance for shipping inquiries.

While AVGearShop.ca makes every effort to get your order to you as soon as possible, please be advised that US customs processing may occasionally delay shipments which is beyond our control. AVGearShop.ca includes the correct costs on all paperwork traveling over the border and therefore maintains no responsibility for any fees that may be charged by US customs. These fees, if any are not included in the advertised price provided by us.

International Shipping

AVGearShop.ca does not fulfill international orders outside of Canada or the contiguous United States on our website. Please contact AVGearShop.ca directly for international order inquiries.

Handling Charges

AVGearShop.ca does not charge any handling fees for shipments in Canada or in the contiguous United States.

Weekend and Holiday Delivery

AVGearShop.ca does not process orders during weekends or holidays. We do our very best to ship all orders on the next business day. (Canada Post is our carrier of choice. For some locations in Canada, Canada Post is now offering weekend deliveries during the holiday season.)

Delivery of Multiple Items

AVGearShop.ca will attempt to ship multiple items purchased on the same order in one box but we may decide to package your items separately due to weight or size concerns. There will be no additional shipping charges added for orders that must be shipped in multiple boxes.

Delivery

Canada Post will make 1 attempt to deliver your package to your door. If no one is home to receive the package, a pick-up notice will be left at your door or mail box to notify of the location of the postal office to pick-up the package. You have up to 10 days to pick-up your package from the postal station after the first attempt. If after 10 days the package is still left unclaimed at the postal office, Canada Post will ship the unclaimed package back to us.

Federal Express will make up to 2 attempts to deliver your package to your door. If no one is home to receive the package, a pick-up notice will be left at your door or mail box to notify of the location of the Federal Express office to pick-up the package.

Please note that it is the responsibility of the customer to pick up the package from the postal station or Federal Express office within the holding period. In the case where the package is left unclaimed and is shipped back to us, the customer will be responsible for the shipping charge incurred for the delivery, and may be charged the returned shipping costs charged to AVGearShop.ca.

Privacy & Security

Information Collection and Use

AVGearShop.ca and its parent and affiliates is the sole owner of information collected on this site. We will not sell, share, or rent this information to any outside parties. We collect information from our customers to process orders and better serve you with pertinent information, such as order confirmations and order status updates. Information collected includes your name, shipping address, billing address, telephone numbers, e-mail address, and payment information such as your credit card number. AVGearShop.ca is committed to protecting the privacy of our customers.

Registration

In order to process your orders on this website, you must either log on as a guest or complete the registration form. During registration, you will be required to create a username and password and provide your contact information, which includes your name, e-mail address, telephone number and street address. This information is used to provide you with important AVGearShop.ca services such as automated order status updates via email. If you choose to log on as a guest, a username and password is not required.

Orders

Most of the information collected in the registration process will be used to process orders. During the order process, you will have to provide financial information such as your credit card number and expiration date. Payment for orders can also be paid using PayPal. This information is used for billing purposes and to fulfill your order. If we have trouble processing an order, we will use this contact information to get in touch with you. We do not share your personal information with any third parties, except those specified in the Sharing section of this policy.

Security

AVGearShop.ca takes precautions to protect its customers’ information. When you submit sensitive information via the website, your information is protected both online and offline. When our registration/order form asks you to enter sensitive information, that information is encrypted and is protected with encryption software. AVGearShop.ca uses a 128/256-bit Positive SSL certificate.

Access to all of users’ information is restricted. AVGearShop.ca operates in a secured and locked facility. Security cameras are positioned throughout the building in conjunction with an alarm system. Only employees who need the information to perform a specific job are granted access to personally identifiable information.

Testimonials

The testimonials section of the AVGearShop.ca website is for the purpose of rating individual products. The testimonials section is moderated to ensure accurate testimonials. Published testimonials are genuine and are not edited or altered by AVGearShop.ca. We reserve the right to post or remove any testimonial at our discretion.

By posting your comment or testimonial on our website, you give us permission to reprint or use the testimonial in connection with our business. You are also agreeing to the following:

  1. The reprint or use of the testimonial will be at our discretion and without compensation
  2. We may use the testimonial with or without any name credit
  3. We may use the testimonial locally or globally and such use may be make in any media including internet advertising
  4. You and not someone else composed and the posted the testimonial

Other than your name, which we may or may not use, your personal contact information will not be disclosed with your testimonial.

Sharing

We may employ third party companies to perform functions on our behalf. These functions may include package delivery, postal delivery and credit processing. The third parties we contract for these purposes have limited access to your personal information and may not use it for other purposes. These third parties include, but are not limited to, the following:

  • Canada Post (www.canadapost.ca)
  • Federal Express (www.fedex.com)
  • PayPal (www.paypal.com)

We reserve the right to disclose your personally identifiable information as required by law and when we believe that disclosure is necessary to protect our rights and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on our Web site.

Links

AVGearShop.ca may contain links to other sites. Please be aware that AVGearShop.ca is not responsible for the privacy practices of such other sites. We encourage our users to be aware when they leave our site and to read the privacy statements of each and every website that collects personal information. This privacy statement applies only to information collected by this website.

Children

We encourage parents to take an active interest in their children’s use of the internet. We do not intend to collect information from children who are under 18 years of age. If you are under the age of 18, you may only use AVGearsShop.ca in the presence of a consenting parent or guardian. We will not knowingly or intentionally collect personal information via the internet from children under the age of 13. AVGearShop.ca is committed to protecting the welfare and privacy of children.

Special/Promotional Offers

Our special/promotional offers are sent only to customers who grant AVGearShop.ca permission to send them such information.

To honour the privacy of our users, we offer the option to not receive these types of communications. At the time of registration, you may opt to not receive special/promotional offers and news by clicking the appropriate field. Furthermore, all special/promotional offers are sent via email and include an opt-out link if you no longer wish to receive special/promotional offers and news. Customers might still receive intermittent updates on recent products ordered and service changes.

Last Update

The Privacy Policy contained herein became officially effective November 18, 2015

Head Office Address

Office Hours
(By appointment only)
Monday - Friday: 9:00am - 4:00pm (E.S.T.)

Returns & Exchanges (30 days)

At AVGearShop.ca we’ll happily accept returns or provide an exchange for any regular-priced items in new condition within 30 days of purchase. Some exceptions apply*.

Refund Policy

All merchandise unless otherwise indicated may be returned within 30 days from the delivery date for a refund. A return authorization number is required for all returns. These terms apply to all refunds. Customers must inform AVGearShop.ca of any order discrepancy within 30 days from the delivery date so that we may investigate and resolve the situation accordingly. Once the merchandise has been returned, a refund will be issued to the original method of payment.

*Christmas / Holiday Season Return Policy
Items purchased between November 1st and December 24th, may be returned until January 15th of the following year for a full refund, subject to our other return guidelines listed above.
*Headphones ( Unopened only policy)

Due to hygienic reasons, AVGearShop.ca will only accept returns for headphones that are unopened. We will not accepted returns for opened and/or used headphones. Regular return policy will apply to any refurbished headphones.

Product Return Procedure

AVGearShop.ca will not accept returns without an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number. Once issued, RMA numbers are valid for 15 days, within which time returned products must be received by AVGearShop.ca. RMA numbers will not be extended or reissued. The Customer should prominently display the RMA number(s) on the shipping label containing the returned product.

The Customer agrees to bear all shipping and insurance charges and all risk of loss for the returned product during shipment. The Customer agrees that all returned products will be 100% complete, in re-saleable condition, and will include the original packaging material, manuals, blank warranty cards, and other accessories provided by the manufacturer. If any component of the returned product is missing, AVGearShop's Return Procedure will be breached and AVGearShop.ca may in its sole and absolute discretion reject the entire return or choose to impose additional charges against the Customer for replacement of the missing component(s). Unless the product is DOA, AVGearShop will not refund the original shipping charges to the Customer.

DOA (Dead On Arrival) Policy

AVGearShop.ca will gladly replace any item that arrives DOA (arrives defective, broken or dead on arrival). If the product is found to be defective, you must let us know within 14 days from the date that you received your item. If a direct replacement is not available, we reserve the right to offer you a replacement of equal or greater value or issue a full refund. Will absorb all related shipping expenses for DOA item(s).

Damaged Products

AVGearShop.ca will gladly replace any item that arrives damaged. If the product is found to be damaged, you must let us know within 14 days from the date that you received your item so a claim can be filed. Pictures of the damaged product will be required in advance prior to the replacement item being shipped. If a direct replacement is not available, we reserve the right to offer you a replacement of equal or greater value or issue a full refund.

Final Sale Items

Some merchandise will be sold under the condition of “Final Sale”. Final Sale items do not qualify under our Refund policy. The DOA Policy will still apply on Final Sale items.

Restocking Fee

A restocking fee will apply if a product is returned in poor and/or damaged condition, without the original packaging or accessories provided by the manufacturer. Shipping charges are non-refundable. AVGearShop does not issue refunds after 30 days from the delivery date.

Warranties

AVGearShop.ca is a distributor only. Products sold by AVGearShop.ca are not manufactured by AVGearShop.ca. The products may, however, be covered by a manufacturer’s warranty, service, and support policy (if present). AVGearShop.ca assigns and passes through to the customer any warranty of the manufacturer, and customer acknowledges that it shall have recourse only under such warranties and only as against the manufacturer of the products. AVGearShop.ca makes no representation or express warranty with respect to the product except those stated in the specific advertisement or this document. AVGearShop.ca disclaims all other warranties, express or implied, as to any such product, including and without limitation, the implied warranties arising from statute, trade usage, course of dealing, or course of performance. Should any of these items prove defective, not function, or function properly in any way after the 14 day DOA period, the buyer, and not the manufacturer or AVGearShop.ca, assumes the entire cost of all necessary servicing or repair.

Limitation of Liability

In all circumstances AVGearShop.ca’s maximum liability is limited to the purchase price of the products sold. AVGearShop.ca shall not, under any circumstances, be liable upon a claim or action in contract, tort, indemnity or contribution, or other claims relating to the products it sells which exceeds this liability limit. AVGearShop.ca shall not be liable for third party claims for damages against the customer, or for malfunction, delays, interruption of service, loss of business, special damages or exemplary damages, whether or not AVGearShop.ca has been made aware of the possibility of such claims and or damages.

Ordering and Local Pick-up

An order is not binding upon AVGearShop.ca until is it accepted; AVGearShop.ca must receive payment before it will accept an order. Payment for product(s) ordered is due prior to shipment. Customer can make payment by PayPal, credit card or some other method prearranged and confirmed in writing with AVGearShop.ca.

Other Payment Methods (Must be Prearranged)

AVGearShop.ca will also accept Interac e-Transfer as well as payment via direct deposit at a local Canadian financial institution. To make a payment using one of these alternatives, please contact us for details. You can contact a customer service representative by calling our office at (905)-792-7617.

Sales Tax

AVGearShop.ca charges GST (HST on sales made in Ontario, New Brunswick, Newfoundland & Labrador, and Nova Scotia) on all sales as required by law.

Free In-Store Pick-up (Local Pick-up)*

AVGearShop.ca Customers have the option to pick-up in-store from our Brampton, Ontario facility. Customers can simply buy online and select free local pick-up during the checkout process. Once your checkout is complete, call us to schedule your pick-up. Please bring identification and the credit card used for the purchase. If using PayPal, a printout of the PayPal confirmation is required.

Alternatively, you can call ahead to reserve an item and pay in-store. We accept cash, Visa or Master Card payments in-store. Reserved items can be put on hold for up to 24 hours.

*Pick-ups are by appointment only. Please call ahead to make arrangements. You can contact one of our representatives by calling (905)-792-7617.

Pick-up hours:
Monday - Thursday: 9am to 4pm
Friday: 9am to 2pm

Our head office is located at:

AVGearShop
80 Devon Road, Unit #2
Brampton, ON
L6T5B3

Sales Tax

AVGearShop.ca charges GST (HST on sales made in British Columbia, New Brunswick, Newfoundland & Labrador, Nova Scotia and Ontario) on all sales as required by law.

Processing Time

AVGearShop.ca processes all orders within approximately 1 to 2 business days, provided there are no problems with payment verification. AVGearShop.ca does not guarantee same day-shipping. Orders are not processed on weekends and holidays. Product delivery could be delayed due to Customs.

Back-Orders

AVGearShop.ca does not sell backordered merchandise. We will never purposely charge a customer for an item that we do not physically have in stock at the time of purchase. Occasional inventory discrepancies may occur due to inaccurate inventory counts. If you are erroneously charged for an out-of-stock item, we will either offer you a replacement of equal or greater value or issue you a full refund.

Order Status

AVGearShop.ca will keep you informed of your order status via email. All tracking information will be emailed to the email address provided.

Change/Cancel Orders

You may request to cancel or change your order provided the order has not already been processed and shipped.

Product Testing

AVGearShop.ca ships items in the condition they were received from the original manufacturer/distributor. AVGearShop.ca does not conduct testing before shipping any merchandise.

Product Listings

AVGearShop.ca strives for accuracy in all item descriptions, photographs, compatibility references, detailed specifications, pricing, links and any other product-related information contained herein or referenced on our website. Due to human error and other factors, we cannot guarantee that all item descriptions, photographs, compatibility references, detailed specifications, pricing, links or any other product-related information listed is entirely accurate, complete or current, nor can we assume responsibility for these errors. In the event a product listed on our website is labeled with an incorrect price due to some typographical, informational, technical or other error, AVGearShop.ca shall at its sole discretion have the right to refuse and/or cancel any order for said product and immediately amend, correct and/or remove the inaccurate information.

Product Revisions

AVGearShop.ca is not responsible for changes or variations in product specifications and/or physical appearance. In the interest of our customers, AVGearShop.ca puts forth its best efforts to ensure that all product information is up-to-date and factual. Unfortunately there are various factors which, although infrequent, could cause the information on our website to become outdated without our immediate knowledge. These include but are not limited to new versions or revisions, color deviations, retail package alterations and other variations that may be considered inconsequential by the manufacturer. AVGearShop.ca relies on the manufacturer to communicate these differences. Presently we have no way of alerting customers prior to purchase in the event the manufacturer fails to notify us. Consequently, AVGearShop.ca will not be held responsible for product revision changes.

Technical Support

AVGearShop.ca currently does not offer any sort of technical assistance. We cannot offer advice on compatibility of items, make product recommendations or provide technical support. We post all of the information the manufacturer provides us with for your convenience. Please contact the manufacturer directly for the most accurate answers to your technical questions or for additional information or specifications that are not posted at AVGearShop.ca.

Payment, Pricing, Price Match & Promotions

Payment

An order is not binding upon AVGearShop.ca until is it accepted; AVGearShop.ca must receive payment before it will accept an order. Payment for product(s) ordered is due prior to shipment. Customers can make payment by credit card, PayPal or some other method prearranged and confirmed in writing with AVGearShop.ca

AVGearShop.ca does not accept cheques or money orders at this time.

Pricing

Please note that all of our advertised prices are in Canadian dollars. AVGearShop.ca charges GST (HST on sales made in British Columbia, New Brunswick, Newfoundland & Labrador, Nova Scotia and Ontario) on all sales as required by law.

Price Protection

AVGearShop.ca offers a one-time price adjustment for all items purchased. In the event our regular advertised price on an item is reduced within 30 days of your purchase date, AVGearShop.ca will refund the difference between the purchase price and the current price.

Price Match Policy (Lowest Price Guarantee)

At AVGearShop.ca you can purchase with confidence. AVGearShop.ca offers a 15% Lowest Price Guarantee. If you find a lower price, we will match that price and beat it with an additional 15% of the difference.

AVGearShop.ca will match any advertised price on an identical product currently advertised by an official Canadian retailer. This offer does not apply to bonus or free offers; private sales; trade-in sales; special orders, limited quantity, "door crashers" or "one of a kind" offers; “after rebate pricing”; coupon, club or wholesale pricing; store credits, gift cards or similar credits; and any competitor’s misprinted advertising.

Items sold in 'as-is' condition including refurbished merchandise, floor models, open stock and scratch-and-dent items are excluded from this offer. AVGearShop.ca reserves the right to verify competitor pricing and availability of price match items, limit quantities of price match items, and to revoke this promotion, and change its terms and conditions, without advance notice. Price match must be requested at the time of purchase or within 30 days of receipt of the item.

Bundle Specials

Bundle Specials are made available by AVGearShop.ca on certain products. These offers are only valid while supplies of all items within the bundle last. AVGearShop.ca cannot guarantee the compatibility of bundle items.

Note: An item advertised as Free in a Bundle Special may still incur a shipping charge.

If you wish to return a Bundle Special for a refund, you must return the ENTIRE BUNDLE within 30 days of the delivery date (subject to all other return guidelines listed above).

Special/Promotional Offers

Our special/promotional offers are sent only to customers who grant AVGearShop.ca permission to send them such information.

To honour the privacy of our users, we offer the option to not receive these types of communications. At the time of registration, you may opt to not receive special/promotional offers and news by clicking the appropriate field. Furthermore, all special/promotional offers are sent via email and include an opt-out link if you no longer wish to receive special/promotional offers and news. Customers might still receive intermittent updates on recent products ordered and service changes.

Viewing Orders

Coming Soon.

Updating Account Information

In order to update your account information (password, email address, telephone number, billing and shipping address), you must first log on to this website using the same username and password that you created during the registration process. There is no option to update your account information if you previously logged on as a guest.

It is important to ensure that you have provided a complete and correct shipping address when placing your order. In the event there is an unsuccessful delivery due to the incorrect shipping address being provided, the customer is responsible for the shipping charge incurred for the delivery, as well as the shipping cost charged to AVGearShop.ca by the carrier for the return delivery.

Please note that while we try our best to catch errors in delivery addresses before the package is shipped, neither Canada Post nor AVGearShop.ca is responsible for correcting an incorrect delivery address and it is the sole responsibility of the customer to ensure the delivery address provided is correct and deliverable by Canada Post.

AVGearShop.ca reserves the right to review and adjust the shipping charge for an order, should an incorrect address be provided during order check out.
